assertions.description: INCORRECT: The backup DAC schematic (Kicad files_BACK_UP_ADACUS_DAC_ADACUS_sch) has identical RC filter misclassifications: rc_filters[0] groups C405+C403 as parallel across different nodes, and rc_filters[2] reports ground_net='OUT_AA_BUF_OUT' for the active filter feedback capacitor. This is the same circuit duplicated in the backup directory.
